events.title: Project inception
events.description: Core idea of representation space traversal as primary AI mechanism first articulated

events.title: Hybrid representation decided
events.description: Graph backbone + primitive leaf attributes chosen to address bloat concern

events.title: Two-system architecture established
events.description: Data system and rewrite system separated, with translation/innovation distinction

events.title: Two-layer library architecture established
events.description: Empirical and reasoned library layers defined with human capability threshold gate

events.title: GitHub MCP connected
events.description: Persistent memory via GitHub MCP established, knowledge base populated

events.title: KB restructured into chunks/ and index/
events.description: Monolithic knowledge_base.json split into per-subtopic files for efficient retrieval
